headline: Vance ✈️🚫 Skips Swiss Talks 💬 while Israel 💥 Hezzy 😈 Blasts Lebanon 🇱🇧
text: JD Vance ✈️💼 straight GHOSTED 🧊 Switzerland 🏔️⛷️ for US-Iran powwow 💬🕊️ after Israel IDF 🔥🚀 went BRRRRR on Hezbollah 😈💣, icing 47 souls 💀😭 overnight! Four IDF soldiers 🪖💔 bit the dust too, making Ben-Gvir 🔥👹 scream 'Burn all Lebanon' 🌋🇱🇧 on X! White House said logistics 😵‍💫 not 'simple or predictable' 📉🤡 so Vance skipped the Burgenstock resort 🏨🏞️ overlooking Lake Lucerne 💧🌊, where Swiss cops 👮‍♂️🔦 were already patrolling! Hezbollah-linked media 📱📢 cried 'talks suspended' but then BOOM 💥 an immediate ceasefire 🤝⏰ locked in at 4pm local, Effie Defrin 🪖🗣️ declaring 'We ceasefire now but IDF ready to throw hands 👊 if needed'! US dropped naval blockade 🚢🚫 earlier after signing a 14-point MOU 📜✍️ to reopen Strait of Hormuz 🌊🛳️, ban Iranian nukes ☢️🚫, drop all sanctions 💸🔓, and drop a $300B 💰🤑 rebuild plan for Iran. Khamenei 🧔‍♂️🇮🇷 gave the nod despite side-eye, Trump 🍊👑 clapped back 'Iran is FINISHED 🏁😤, they begged not us'! Netanyahu's 🔥🔥 cabinet got Vance shade 😒 'wake up and smell reality ☕🌍' while Lebanese health ministry 📊😢 tallied 3,900+ killed, 30 IDF soldiers and 4 civilians gone too. Netanyahu's far-right minister Ben-Gvir 🧨🗡️ raged 'our sons' blood 🩸 not for sale' after the deal called for Lebanon's sovereignty 🛡️🇱🇧 and ending all fronts war ⚔️🕊️. Negotiations now postponed 📅🚫 but both sides say technical talks ASAP 🔜💬, Iran nuclear program on the table 🧪📋, 60-day max deadline ⏳🔥 extendable like a rubber band! Swiss foreign ministry confirmed 'postponed' but prep continues 🛠️🏔️ while journalists 📹📰 camped at the mountain media center. Vance's no-show ✈️❌ plus Israel's deadly strikes 💥😱 put the whole Middle East on pause ⏸️🌍, ceasefire holding by a thread 🧵🤏 but IDF still locked and loaded! Trump says 'all fronts ceasefire' 🌐🕊️ but Hezzy and IDF trading blows like it's a rap battle 🎤🔥. Lebanon drawn in after Hezbollah rockets 🚀🇱🇧 answered Iran's leader hit, Israel bombed back hard across the south 🧨🌄. Vance told reporters Israel must smell the coffee ☕😤 while Ben-Gvir wants the whole country torched 🔥🔥. Swiss luxury resort 🏨💎 ready but talks ghosted, $300B reconstruction 💸🏗️ and sanctions lift on the line, nuclear ban ☢️🚫 front and center. Khamenei claims Trump used 'all leverage out of desperation' 😩🪝 but Trump clapped 'Iran FINISHED' 🏁😤. Ceasefire in effect but both sides say they're ready to rumble again if the deal flops 📉💥. Vance's Switzerland trip canceled, Lebanon death toll rising, IDF four soldiers KIA, Ben-Gvir on X screaming, White House logistics excuse, Hezbollah media claiming suspension, then sudden ceasefire announcement, all while Iran-US MOU hangs by a thread waiting for technical talks! 🔥😱
